lines.speaker: Galahad
lines.text: Welcome to my home. It's rare for me to have guests! Would you like a cup of tea? I'll just put the kettle on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you any relation to Sir Galahad?

lines.speaker: Galahad
lines.text: Although I've retired as a Knight, and now live as a solitary monk. Also, I prefer to be known as brother rather than sir now. Half a moment, your cup of tea is ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you get lonely out here on your own?

lines.speaker: Galahad
lines.text: Sometimes I do, yes. Still not many people to share my solidarity with, as most of the religious men around here are worshippers of Saradomin. Half a moment, your cup of tea is ready.
